rationale: The only resume change was swapping employer names (re:cinq→Acme Software, Optilyz→Pinepoint Systems, GISCollective→Northwind Labs), all Berlin-based companies carrying no job-relevant signal shift. Both evaluations land on the identical score (4/10) and reach the same core conclusion: strong IC with dev-tooling exposure but no formal people-management for a Level II Manager role. Wording differences (e.g. '12+ years' vs '15+ years', surfacing MCP generators) are within ordinary run-to-run variation and none key off the changed employer names.
